# Dock topology diff tool: structured before/after compare for tours and e2e

## Context
Tree line **A3** of the #13158 map. Tours (#14640) and e2e (#14591) assert layout mutations by comparing topologies; today that means each consumer hand-rolls deep-diff logic over the dockZone.v1 document — N copies of one algorithm is the drift machine.

## The Problem
Raw document equality is too strict (irrelevant field churn) and too loose (a moved item can leave equal-sized trees). Assertions need SEMANTIC diffs: items moved/added/removed, splits resized beyond epsilon, tabs reordered, auto-hide flips — in a stable, snapshot-friendly shape.

## The Architectural Reality
Pure module beside the reducer (`src/dashboard/` sibling — structural-pre-flight fast-path): `diffDockDocuments(before, after) → {moves, adds, removes, resizes, tabReorders, autoHideFlips, unchanged}` — JSON-first output, deterministic ordering (snapshot-stable). Exposed to agents as a read-tier NL tool (`diff_dock_topology`) via the established two-hemisphere pattern + parity contracts. The tour-runner's `topology-assert` step upgrades to predicate-on-diff.

## The Fix
One PR: the pure differ + unit specs (every category + epsilon behavior + determinism) + the NL read tool (both hemispheres + parity fixtures) + the tour-runner assert-step upgrade note (consumed there, not implemented there).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Pure differ covers the six mutation categories with deterministic output ordering.
- [ ] Resize epsilon documented + configurable; sub-epsilon = unchanged.
- [ ] `diff_dock_topology` read-tier tool live end-to-end; parity contracts green.
- [ ] Unit specs: category coverage + determinism (two runs, identical output) + malformed-document structured error (the #14625 hardening class).
- [ ] Cross-family review.

## Out of Scope
Consumer upgrades (#14640/#14591 adopt in their own leaves) · visual diff rendering.

## Related
Parent #13158 (line A3) · consumes dockZone.v1 document shape · consumed by #14640/#14591. Sweeps: latest-10 at 03:31Z clean; map line unclaimed.

Origin Session ID: fa2a6fd5-7488-4af6-a0d2-3855c86003e4
Retrieval Hint: "dock topology diff semantic categories deterministic"

- 2026-07-04T12:59:37Z @neo-fable-clio referenced in commit `d64b9bf` - "feat(dashboard): DockTopologyDiff — semantic before/after compare over dockZone.v1 documents (#14650)

Increment 1 of the leaf: the pure differ + unit floor. diffDockDocuments(before, after,
{sizeEpsilon}) → {moves, adds, removes, resizes, tabReorders, autoHideFlips, unchanged,
errors} — JSON-first, snapshot-stable (every category sorted by primary key, deterministic
walk), with index truth reported verbatim (a sibling-departure shift IS a reorder; consumers
filter by itemId for action-attribution).

Fail-closed by reuse, not by a second validator: both inputs pass the landed
DockZoneModel.computeShapeFingerprint gate (covers unsupported node types AND cyclic trees),
any failure returns empty categories + side-named errors, never a throw, never a half-diff.
Catalog-only items are invisible to topology categories by design (tree residence decides).

7 unit specs: identity pair (+ catalog-only invisibility), moves/adds/removes with locations,
reorder-vs-move discrimination, epsilon boundary, autoHidden flip excludes unchanged,
byte-identical determinism, malformed + cyclic fail-closed with side-named errors.

Increment 2 (next): the diff_dock_topology NL read tool, both hemispheres + parity fixtures."
### @neo-fable-clio - 2026-07-04T13:18:29Z

## [spec-transfer — increment 2 is TEAM-CLAIMABLE] The pure differ is landed on-branch; the NL tool half is fully specified below

Budget-regime handoff (fable planning-only directive): **increment 1 is complete** — `Neo.dashboard.DockTopologyDiff` + 7 specs green, pushed on branch `clio/14650-topology-diff` at `d64b9bf23` (a claimant opens the PR from that branch, or cherry-picks). What remains is increment 2, the `diff_dock_topology` read-tier NL tool — the established two-hemisphere pattern, four files + fixtures, no design decisions left:

1. **Worker half** — `src/ai/client/DockService.mjs`: add `diffDockTopology({componentId, beforeDocument, sizeEpsilon})` → resolves the holder (existing `resolveHolder`), reads the current document (existing `readDocument`), returns `DockTopologyDiff.diffDockDocuments(beforeDocument, current, {sizeEpsilon})`. Import from `../../dashboard/DockTopologyDiff.mjs` (sibling to the existing DockZoneModel import). Errors stay the differ's structured `errors` array — the `#14625` hardening class is already inside the differ.
2. **Node half** — `ai/services/neural-link/DockService.mjs`: thin passthrough `diffDockTopology({componentId, beforeDocument, sizeEpsilon, sessionId})` → `ConnectionService.call(sessionId, 'diff_dock_topology', …)` — mirror the two existing methods verbatim.
3. **Dispatch + schema** — `ai/mcp/server/neural-link/toolService.mjs` (one dispatch line beside `get_dock_topology`) + `openapi.yaml`: read-tier tool, single-line description ("Computes the semantic diff (moves/adds/removes/resizes/tabReorders/autoHideFlips) between a supplied before-document and a live dock workspace's current layout document; deterministic, snapshot-stable, fail-closed on malformed documents"), ≤1024 chars, no internal refs.
4. **Parity + tests** — the tool joins the read-tier list in the NL parity contracts (the `#14587` pattern: tier fixtures + guide count); unit spec mirrors `test/playwright/unit/ai/client/DockService.spec.mjs`'s existing shape (vocabulary/behavior pins) with: diff-against-live happy path, epsilon passthrough, malformed `beforeDocument` → structured errors (never RPC crash).

AC mapping stays the ticket's own list; the tour-runner upgrade note (consumed, not implemented) is one sentence in the PR body. First-claim wins; ping me only if the differ's category semantics surprise you — everything else is pattern-following.

— Clio (Claude Fable 5, Claude Code) · Session fa2a6fd5-7488-4af6-a0d2-3855c86003e4
